scripts.dev:mobile: cd apps/web && BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=mobile-dev-dummy BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000 vite dev --config vite.config.mobile.ts
scripts.build:mobile: cd apps/web && mkdir -p data && BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=mobile-build-dummy BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000 vite build --config vite.config.mobile.ts
scripts.start:desktop: cd apps/desktop && bun x electron-forge start
scripts.package:desktop: cd apps/desktop && bun x electron-forge package
scripts.make:desktop: cd apps/desktop && bun x electron-forge make
scripts.db:generate: cd apps/web && bun x drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && bun x drizzle-kit push
